sn9.5:1.1: On one occasion the Venerable Ānanda was dwelling among the Kosalans in a certain woodland thicket. Now on that occasion the Venerable Ānanda was excessively involved instructing lay people.Then the devata that inhabited that woodland thicket, having compassion for the Venerable Ānanda, desiring his good, desiring to stir up a sense of urgency in him, approached him and addressed him in verse:
sn9.5:3.1: Then the Venerable Ānanda, stirred up by that deity, acquired a sense of urgency.
